name: python3-plotly
title: python3-plotly
summary: Python 3 plotting library for publication-quality graphs
description:
Python 3 plotting library for publication-quality graphs
Python 3 plotting library for collaborative, interactive, publication-quality
graphs. Plotly is an online collaborative data analysis and graphing tool.
The Python API allows you to access all of Plotly's functionality from Python.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-plotly because Python 3 plotting library for publication-quality graphs.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-plotly as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-plotly with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-plotly --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
